• Creates a high‑detail mining game with procedural terrain, custom textures, and multiplayer syncing.
  • Implements UI elements like gauges, modals, chat, and admin panel, plus mobile touch controls.
  • Provides a shop for upgrades, consumables, and explosives, plus save‑load and cloud sync.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy('drill')

This HTML page defines a browser‑based mining game called “Mega Miner NG”. It renders a large procedurally generated world on a canvas, supports movement, drilling, building, and explosives, and syncs player actions via MQTT. The UI includes touch‑friendly mobile controls, configurable settings, a shop, inventory dashboard, chat, and admin tools, while custom textures and sound are managed through modular systems. The code also handles saves, cloud sync, and a simple update checker.
